paragraph.heading: Appointment.—
paragraph.content: Notwithstanding any other provision of this title, the conservator or receiver who files the petition shall be the trustee under this chapter, unless the Board designates an alternative trustee.

paragraph.heading: Successor.—
paragraph.content: The Board may designate a successor trustee if required.

subsection.heading: Authority of Trustee.—
subsection.content: Whenever the Board appoints or designates a trustee, chapter 3 and sections 704 and 705 of this title shall apply to the Board in the same way and to the same extent that they apply to a United States trustee.
